reasoning: Billie Eilish is an incredibly popular artist, but artists like Taylor Swift, The Weeknd, and Bad Bunny have consistently out-streamed her over full-year periods historically. Swift and Bad Bunny have massive back catalogs that continuously generate millions of daily streams, making it very difficult for any artist with a smaller total discography to surpass them in annual sum streams. Billie has about ~100M monthly listeners and was #5 in 2024, but her total streams over the year are typically a fraction of the #1 spot, which was Taylor Swift in 2023 and 2024. Therefore, her probability of being #1 in 2025 is quite low, around 4%.
